subject: Docs Audit — Missing Images, Orphaned Pages, Broken Anchor, Empty Table
body:
## Documentation Audit Report

> Scanned: `docs/` — all `.md` files (57 files across 12 directories)

---

## 1. Missing Images ⚠️ Warning

Over **50 image references resolve to non-existent files**. The majority are in `features/`, `options/`, `reference/`, and `concepts/` subdirectories. Many are already annotated with `> 📸 *Screenshot needed: ...*`, confirming they are known placeholders rather than accidental deletions. The following table lists all affected files and their missing images.

| File | Missing Image(s) |
|------|------------------|
| `concepts/agents.md` | `images/agent-cards-main-window.png`, `images/agent-transcript-multi-open.png` |
| `concepts/documentation-panel.md` | `images/screenshot.png` |
| `concepts/transcripts.md` | `images/transcript-panel-layout.png`, `images/transcript-quick-reply.png` |
| `customization/Tinting and Themes.md` | `images/tint-swatches.png`, `images/tint-menu.png`, `images/accent-offset-menu.png` |
| `features/attach-clipboard-text.md` | `images/attach-clipboard-text-pill.png` |
| `features/entering-prompts.md` | `images/prompt-input-idle.png`, `images/prompt-input-abort.png`, `images/prompt-at-intellisense.png`, `images/prompt-at-accepted.png` |
| `features/fullscreen-transcript.md` | `images/fullscreen-view-menu.png`, `images/fullscreen-transcript-active.png`, `images/fullscreen-prompt-peek.png` |
| `features/hiring-agents.md` | `images/hire-agent-result-sidebar.png` |
| `features/prompt-queue.md` | `images/prompt-queue-tabs.png`, `images/prompt-queue-tab-nav.png`, `images/prompt-queue-edit.png`, `images/prompt-queue-priority-feedback.png`, `images/prompt-queue-paused.png` |
| `features/text-formatting.md` | `images/text-formatting-inline-code.png`, `images/text-formatting-code-fence.png`, `images/text-formatting-inline-quote.png` |
| `features/voice-input.md` | `images/voice-input-recording.png`, `images/voice-input-annotation.png` |
| `getting-started/first-run.md` | `images/main-window-agent-cards.png`, `images/transcript-panel-open.png`, `images/preferences-dialog-speech.png` |
| `options/ai.md` | `images/options-ai.png` |
| `options/custom-model.md` | `images/options-custom-model.png` |
| `options/general.md` | `images/options-general.png` |
| `options/notifications.md` | `images/options-notifications.png` |
| `options/README.md` | `images/options-overview.png` |
| `options/remote-access.md` | `images/options-remote-access.png` |
| `options/sounds.md` | `images/options-sounds.png`, `images/options-sounds-tts.png` |
| `options/speech.md` | `images/options-speech.png` |
| `panels/Tasks.md` | `images/tasks-panel-filter.png`, `images/tasks-filter-at-intellisense.png` |
| `reference/configuration.md` | `images/preferences-dialog-speech-config.png` |
| `reference/keyboard-shortcuts.md` | `images/tint-menu.png` |
| `reference/loop-file-custom-ui.md` | `images/loop-custom-ui-bool-checkbox.png`, `images/loop-custom-ui-enum-dropdown.png`, `images/loop-custom-ui-group-header.png`, `images/loop-custom-ui-text-input.png`, `images/loop-custom-ui-full-example.png` |
| `reference/loop-file-templates.md` | `images/loop-settings-options-ui.png` |
| `reference/remote-control/setup-local.md` | `../images/rc-qr-code-transcript.png` |
| `reference/remote-control/setup-ngrok.md` | `../images/rc-preferences-tunnel.png` |

**Severity:** Warning. Readers see broken image placeholders. The screenshot automation infrastructure (`IReplayableUiAction`, fixture loaders) is in place per the ADRs; this is a content gap waiting on capture runs.

---

## 2. Broken Anchor Fragment ⚠️ Warning

**File:** `features/hiring-agents.md` — *## Agent Lifecycle Commands*

**Link:** `../reference/slash-commands.md#squadDash-ui-commands`

**Problem:** The heading in `reference/slash-commands.md` is `## SquadDash UI Commands`. GitHub Flavored Markdown and most static site generators normalise heading anchors to **lowercase**, generating `#squaddash-ui-commands`. The link uses camelCase `#squadDash-ui-commands` — the `D` and `-ui` portion will not resolve in production, leaving the reader on the top of the slash commands page rather than the intended section.

**Fix:** Change the fragment to `#squaddash-ui-commands`.

---

## 3. Orphaned Pagesℹ️ Info

The following pages have no inbound links from any other doc page and do not appear in `SUMMARY.md`.

### `features/inbox.md` — ⚠️ Likely superseded duplicate

This file has `title: Inbox Panel` and `parent: Features` frontmatter. The current canonical Inbox Panel documentation is `panels/Inbox.md` (linked in `SUMMARY.md`). The `features/inbox.md` version appears to be an older draft — it covers the same topic with less detail and a different parent section. It is not linked from any page and will never be reached by a reader following normal navigation.

**Recommendation:** Confirm whether `features/inbox.md` should be deleted (superseded) or merged into `panels/Inbox.md`.

### `features/inbox-selection-attach.md` — ℹ️ Forgotten feature doc

Documents the "Attach to Chat from Inbox Message Selection" feature (right-click selected text → *Attach to Chat*). Well-written and complete, but not linked from `SUMMARY.md`, `panels/Inbox.md`, or any other page. Readers have no way to discover it.

**Recommendation:** Add a link from `panels/Inbox.md` (Context Menu section) or from the Related section.

### `loop-files/loop-fix-tagged-tasks.md` — ℹ️ Not a docs page

This is a loop template file for app use (it has YAML frontmatter with `configured: true`, `options:`, and loop instructions). It lives inside `loop-files/` — it is not documentation. It is correctly unreachable from the docs tree.

### `decisions/` ADRs — ℹ️ Intentionally excluded

`decisions/replay-ui-action-architecture.md` and `decisions/screenshot-metadata-schema.md` both have `nav_exclude: true` in their frontmatter. These are Architecture Decision Records intentionally kept out of navigation. No action needed.

---

## 4. Accuracy Issues ℹ️ Info

### `concepts/agents.md` — Empty "Tool Call Tracking" table

**Section:** `## Tool Call Tracking`

The table has a header row (`Tool | Icon | Label`) and separator row but **zero data rows**. This looks like unfinished documentation — readers see a heading and an empty table with no content.

**Recommendation:** Either populate the tool-icon mapping (grep, edit, view, task, etc. with their icons) or remove the section heading and table until it can be completed.

### `README.md` — AI-generated disclaimer

**Line:** *"Note: This documentation is largely AI generated at this point and has not been reviewed."*

This disclaimer is visible on the home page. It may be appropriate to update or remove it once pages have been reviewed, to avoid undermining reader confidence.

---

## 5. Internal Links ✅ Pass

All `[text](path)` internal links in all57 markdown files resolve to existing files. No broken internal page links detected.

---

## 6. External Links ✅ Pass (spot-checked)

All sampled external URLs responded successfully:
- `https://dotnet.microsoft.com/download/dotnet/10.0` — live (returns 403 on HEAD, 200 on GET — normal Microsoft CDN behaviour)
- `https://nodejs.org/`, `https://github.com/MillerMark/squad-dash/releases`, `https://ollama.com`, `https://ntfy.sh`, `https://ngrok.com` — all200 OK

---

## Summary

| Category | Count | Severity |
|----------|-------|----------|
| Missing images | 50+ references across27 files | Warning |
| Broken anchor fragment | 1 (`#squadDash-ui-commands`) | Warning |
| Orphaned pages (genuine) | 2 (`features/inbox.md`, `features/inbox-selection-attach.md`) | Info |
| Accuracy gaps | 1 (empty Tool Call Tracking table) | Info |
| Broken internal page links | 0 | ✅ |
| Broken external links | 0 | ✅ |

actions.label: Fix broken anchor
actions.prompt: Mira: a docs audit found a broken heading anchor in `docs/features/hiring-agents.md`, in the section `## Agent Lifecycle Commands`. The link `../reference/slash-commands.md#squadDash-ui-commands` uses camelCase which won't resolve — the target heading `## SquadDash UI Commands` in `reference/slash-commands.md` generates the lowercase anchor `#squaddash-ui-commands`. Please update the link in `features/hiring-agents.md` to use `#squaddash-ui-commands` (all lowercase). Also check for the same fragment used anywhere else in the docs.

actions.label: Resolve inbox.md duplicate
actions.prompt: Mira: a docs audit found that `docs/features/inbox.md` appears to be a superseded duplicate of `docs/panels/Inbox.md`. Both have `title: Inbox Panel` but `features/inbox.md` is not linked from SUMMARY.md or any other page and has less detail than `panels/Inbox.md`. Please investigate whether `features/inbox.md` should be deleted (if fully superseded) or whether any content in it should be merged into `panels/Inbox.md` before deletion. Also, `docs/features/inbox-selection-attach.md` ("Attach to Chat from Inbox Message Selection") is a complete feature doc with no inbound links — consider adding a link to it from the Context Menu section of `docs/panels/Inbox.md` or its Related section.

actions.label: Fill empty Tool Call table
actions.prompt: Mira: a docs audit found that `docs/concepts/agents.md`, section `## Tool Call Tracking`, has a table with header `Tool | Icon | Label` but zero data rows — the table body is completely empty. Please populate it with the tool call icons thatSquadDash displays in the transcript (e.g. grep🔎, edit ✏️, view 👀, task 🤖, and any others). Check the source code (likely in the transcript rendering or tool-icon mapping area of theSquadDash WPF project) to find the authoritative list of tools and their icons/labels.
actions.hint: Populate the empty Tool Call Tracking table

actions.label: Dismiss
actions.hint: Acknowledge — no action will be taken
